title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: CEOs who despised Trump’s tariffs are still silent after Supreme Court ruling: ‘There’s no upside in speaking up’
items.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

items.title: Trump boasts that the U.S. has ‘the greatest economy actually ever.’ Human nature suggests that’s exactly the wrong message to send to voters
items.description: History suggests that voters' anxiety can outweigh good economic numbers at the polls. Just ask George Bush and Bill Clinton.

items.title: U.S. asks citizens in Mexico to shelter after cartel leader killed
items.description: The security alert covers the states of Jalisco, Tamaulipas, Michoacán, Guerrero and Nuevo León.

items.title: Delta expects to halt flights at NYC, Boston airports for storm
items.description: More than 8,500 flights have been canceled through Tuesday, according to tracking site FlightAware.

items.title: DBS, Southeast Asia’s largest bank, partners with VC giant Granite Asia to counter the region’s lack of capital
items.description: The partnership launches with a new $110 million fund, exclusively for DBS's wealth clients, that targets IPO-stage AI and tech startups in the region...
